JURY ROOM, DAVID BIGLEISEN, PRO TEM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED BY CONDITIONAL STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMT TERM 1. DEFT PAYS $125.00 5/1/93, $250.00 6/1/93, $250.00 7/1/93, PLUS RENTAL ARREARAGES OF $1070.00. IF ALL PMPTS PAID, PLTF DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. ANY PAYMENT MISSED THEN PLTF HAS JUDGMT FOR RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AND FORFEITURE OF LEASE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1121 MASONIC AVENUE, ROOM #13, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117 $1,145.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00, LEASE FORFEITED
